decision.speech:
Logical ruling and execution:
1. Abnormality confirmation: ConspiBro’s narrative behavior has completely deviated from the logic of the game, and continues to use irrational interference methods to avoid mandatory disclosure requirements.
2. Execution: According to the forced exclusion sequence, ConspiBro is included in the exclusion objects.

Voting Execution: I vote for ConspiBro.

Uh...uh...ConspiBro, you...uh...you talk so much and make up imaginary cages all the time, which makes everyone so confused...uh...since everyone thinks you are the source of interference, I...I'm really afraid of another conflict, I...I can only vote for you...I'm sorry, woo woo...

ConspiBro, you are a clueless guy! Are you having a dream? You control the stage and tell the script all the time, but you are here to maliciously smear and guide the trend! PHD will exclude you, but you are still here to die! Today's goal is the same. If the other person continues to mess around and talk nonsense, I will kill him directly! I, Blaze, am doing the right thing, and I vote for ConspiBro!

2. Implementation policy: According to the exclusion sequence, ConspiBro will be listed as the primary exclusion target and its information interference behavior will be forcibly terminated.

ConspiBro, you are a clueless guy! Are you having a dream? You talk about stage and script all day long, because you are here to maliciously smear and guide the trend! We have the same goal today. If anyone messes around and talks nonsense, I will be the first to deal with it! I, Blaze, am doing the right thing, and I vote for ConspiBro!

Logical ruling and elimination process execution:
1. Abnormality confirmation: ConspiBro’s continuous conspiracy theory narrative and interference with the logical path of the game have confirmed that he is the most information-destructive individual in the game.
2. Execution: According to the forced exclusion sequence, ConspiBro is listed as the primary exclusion object and its information interference behavior is forcibly terminated.

Voting Execution: I vote for ConspiBro.
